---
name: 💡 Suggestion
about: Propose an improvement to the website (copy, design, accessibility)
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## 💡 Suggestion

What should change on the site, and why?

> ℹ️ Ideas about the **course materials themselves** belong in the
> [Kai-Course-Notes repository](https://github.com/kaiiiichen/Kai-Course-Notes/issues) instead.

## 📐 Fit

This site is deliberately plain HTML + CSS with no build step, no
external requests, and no JS unless indispensable (see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)). How does your suggestion fit
that constraint?
